summary: Sanitized public demo cases generated from the contract-intelligence gold corpus.

cases.title: Caltrans Cmgc Context
highlights: CMGC pricing off-ramp may leave preconstruction effort stranded
Must-fix before bid: Clarify recovery if the GMP is rejected and confirm that preconstruction services are fully compensable on their own.
Monitoring alert posture: 2 open alert(s) in the reference lifecycle snapshot.

cases.title: Missing Insurance Package
highlights: Pay-if-paid structure shifts collection risk downstream
Must-fix before bid: Seek pay-when-paid language or an outside payment deadline.

cases.title: Riverside Bridge
highlights: Pay-if-paid structure shifts collection risk downstream
Broad indemnity language may exceed reasonable contractor risk
Must-fix before bid: Seek pay-when-paid language or an outside payment deadline.
Monitoring alert posture: 2 open alert(s) in the reference lifecycle snapshot.
